title: hemionitis neglecta
intro: Hemionitis neglecta, a species of fern, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Hemionitis neglecta include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting liver function. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or dried powder for herbal remedies, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and potential side effects.
